offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes late submissions to clients. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reconciliation.
problem: Manual categorization and reconciliation of travel expenses is time-consuming.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on expense workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Community forums for accounting tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry for exceptions and summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
